dropped.reason: too short to carry a claim

meta.model: Gemini gemini-flash-lite-latest · US (and trains on free-tier prompts)

clusters.label: iPad cursor jumping and text input obstruction
Forced AI features and obstructive bottom bar
Mobile app performance lag, crashes, and freezes
Lack of Ukrainian and other interface languages
Login loops and forced sign-in hurdles
Critical data loss and disappearing notes

insights.title: Forced placement of generative AI elements disrupts core navigation and clutters the UI.
insights.summary: Recent layout revisions replace traditional navigation shortcuts, such as the home and search functions, with prominent, non-removable AI chat bars. Customers who rely on custom page layouts find their screen real estate heavily compromised by unsolicited tooling. Because there is no toggle to disable these elements, users feel alienated by aggressive feature promotion. This persistent overlay frequently leads to accidental taps and workflow friction.

evidence.name: HU
evidence.quote: The button for AI is large and centered on the bottom of your screen instead of a search bar like it used to be. There was also a way to turn it off prior and now there isn't.…

evidence.name: NN
evidence.quote: The Notion decision makers seem to have little respect for their customers. Despite having five paid Notion accounts, the app has a huge Notion AI search bar at the bottom that we…

evidence.name: ZN
evidence.quote: This has been an amazing app and such a boon to me. I was very frustrated and inconvenienced when they replaced the bottom bar, which used to have a home button on it, with a…

insights.recommendation: Introduce a user preference toggle in the settings menu to hide the bottom AI chat bar and restore the default navigation shortcuts.

insights.title: Mobile clients suffer from severe input lag, memory bloat, and frequent application freezes.
insights.summary: Routine interactions such as opening pages, scrolling through databases, and modifying text trigger noticeable slowdowns on smartphones. Many users report that long documents cause the application to become entirely unresponsive, necessitating repeated forced restarts. This instability severely degrades day-to-day productivity for individuals attempting quick captures on mobile devices. Consequently, customers lose confidence in the reliability of the local caching and synchronization layers.

evidence.name: AL
evidence.quote: When I first downloaded the app months ago and started using it, it was really good and was working very well. Lately, with all the new updates, it just seems to be having major…

evidence.name: R
evidence.quote: The worst part about this app is that just when you start depending on it for something important it starts glitching in some new and horribly frustrating way. Don’t waste your…

evidence.name: DA
evidence.quote: It is almost impossible to use Notion on iPad. Page icons are not loading, sometimes it lagging so badly I can’t even type simple text on pages. Often shows that I’m offline, but…

insights.recommendation: Optimize database rendering performance for long documents and streamline local cache management to eliminate memory leaks and frequent crashes.

insights.title: Typing on the iPad app causes the viewport to jump unexpectedly, obscuring the active line.
insights.summary: Users typing on tablets experience a severe rendering flaw where the screen auto-adjusts or scrolls away from the cursor position. This completely hides the text being entered and renders the application virtually unusable for document editing. The bug persists across multiple OS updates without resolution. Tablet users are forced to abandon the native client in favor of external browsers or desktop machines.

evidence.name: CR
evidence.quote: geht seit ein paar Versionen nicht mehr sinnvoll auf dem Ipad. Cursor springt beim schreiben auf den Ipad Pro 11 Zoll (M1) immer nach oben weg und ist nicht sichtbar.

evidence.name: XE
evidence.quote: Eigentlich liebe ich Notion und nutze es sowohl über Web, iPhone und iPad. Leider scheint es seit einiger Zeit viele Probleme mit der iPad Version zu geben. Bei Texteingabe friert…

evidence.name: YU
evidence.quote: Whenever I type, the screen goes down. I hope this can be fixed.

insights.recommendation: Disable automatic viewport shifting during keyboard focus events and ensure the active typing line remains vertically pinned within the visible safe zone.
